name: Emergency Services
description: If you or someone else is in immediate danger

name: NHS 111
description: Urgent mental health support when it's not an emergency

name: Samaritans
description: Confidential emotional support for anyone in distress or struggling to cope

name: Shout
description: Free, confidential, 24/7 text messaging support service for anyone in crisis

name: CALM (Campaign Against Living Miserably)
description: Support for men (though anyone can call) struggling with life or suicidal thoughts

name: Papyrus HOPELINEUK
description: Suicide prevention service for young people under 35

name: AWP Crisis Line (Wiltshire)
description: Local NHS mental health crisis line for Wiltshire residents
